title: Public Web Research Real LLM Smoke
goal: Research the public IANA example domains page and produce a concise evidence-backed artifact that explains what the page is for.
constraints: Use only public source material from the provided URL.
Preserve source URL and fetch metadata.
acceptance_criteria: The worker fetches the provided public URL.
The worker submits a markdown research artifact.
The worker reports findings, risks, confidence, and next action.
